title: lithodora prostrata subsp. lusitanica
intro: Lithodora prostrata subsp. lusitanica, commonly known as the Dwarf Lithodora, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant in the borage family native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Lithodora prostrata subsp. lusitanica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using them in teas, tinctures, and essential oils.
